element_introduction_order.element: Standard Tetris blocks (I, O, T, S, Z, J, L pieces)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Core mechanic - player familiarizes through continuous play
Hybrid gameplay - Tetris pieces combined with Dr. Mario clearing conditions
AI opponent difficulty escalates through selectable stone tablet levels

typical_relief_triggers: Completing puzzle objectives against CPU opponent
Dropping pieces quickly to reduce board height
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Turn-based puzzle hybrid with escalating pressure as play continues; relief cycles tied to successful clears and puzzle completion

difficulty_curve.early_game: Relaxed introduction to Tetris/Dr. Mario hybrid mechanics; selectable CPU difficulty levels via stone tablet interface
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Progressive increase in falling piece speed and CPU opponent sophistication
difficulty_curve.late_game: High-speed play with complex strategic decisions around block placement and clearing patterns
notable_spikes: Transition from standard Tetris to puzzle-clear objectives
CPU difficulty level increases (visually represented by stone tablet graphics)

notable_level_patterns.description: Combines falling Tetris pieces with Dr. Mario-style clearing objectives; player must arrange pieces to create specific matching patterns rather than simple line clears
Selectable difficulty tiers presented via stone tablet UI; difficulty represented through CPU opponent skill levels

sources_used: tcrf - Tetris 2 (NES) The Cutting Room Floor
